timeline.subtitle: World Championships Champion
achievements: 🏆 Manchester World Championships Women's Team & Doubles Champion

timeline.subtitle: Sydney Olympics
achievements: 🥈 Sydney Olympics Women's Doubles Runner-up (with Sun Jin)

timeline.subtitle: Osaka World Championships
achievements: 🏆 Osaka World Championships Women's Team Champion

achievements.title: ⭐ National Team Star
achievements.description: Yang Ying was known for her penhold fast attack style, a representative of penhold play in Chinese women's table tennis. After retirement, she became a CCTV table tennis commentator.
